Notes on the observation and reduction of UGC 7081

Observations

  • Quality: reasonable
Observational parameters at full resolution (see also here for more information).
UGC Bandwidth (MHz) Number of channels Central velocity of spectral band (km/s) channel separation (km/s) Synthesized beam full resolution (arcsec) R.m.s. noise of cleaned full resolution maps (mJy/beam)
7081 2.48 127 770 4.14 13.8 x 10.5 2.9

For more information on the quality of the observations, click here (User ID = anonymous, no Password). This hyper-link gives access to the NFRA database.

Reduction uv-plane

  • Quality Fourier-transformed data (= channel maps): reasonable
  • Notes on "dirty" channel maps: no
  • Internal notes for the data-manager

Reduction image-plane

  • Quality "cleaned" channel maps: reasonable
  • Notes on "cleaned" channel maps: no
  • Internal notes for the data-manager
